humor_links.title: Starter packs for things you will start but never finish.

cartoons.image_alt: Three small winged fairies hover above a woman holding a baby and one of them speaks.
cartoons.caption: "I grant her three gifts—the whimsy of Moo Deng the hippo, the sweetness of Punch the monkey, and the resilience of Jimothy the raccoon."

cartoons.title: Daily Cartoon: Monday, July 20th

humor_links.title: How to be a mysterious woman who is also in bed by 9:30 P.M.
I’ll have kids in a few years, when I’m successful and wealthy and my life is finally perfect.
I am a Tinder guy holding a fish, and I will provide for you.
The most effective group-chat-ending texts.
Behold, I have returned from a hike.
